texto: A good villain exudes charisma and power. He has principles, though; that just gives him a level of dimension. It makes him seem to be a bit unpredictable, because he's usually deemed as some type of evil, ruthless person, and then he shows you his principles, and you don't know what to think of it.
explicacao: Citação de Pusha T sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “A good villain exudes charisma and power. He has principles, though; that just gives him a level …” articula reflexao, power, evil em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como evil e know.
